metadata.description: Auto-generated from experiments/*/results.json and addons/*_results.json. Do not edit this file manually; edit experiment scripts and regenerate.

table_1_main_results.note: Proposed values in bold. All non-Planned results use synthetic or literature-derived baselines. PGRL EVM of 99.5% reflects large residual CFO of ~300 Hz at SNR=40 dB — PGRL compensates substantially vs SGP4 (208%) but a gap to oracle (0.99%) remains; hardware-level CFO tracking or residual feedback is required for robust LR-FHSS operation.

table_2_ablation.note: All values synthesized from literature-derived baselines. Real PGRL performance requires hybrid_f5.pth weights from training machine.

rows: Too small for SGP4 σ; 100% miss
Calibrated σ; near-zero miss; minimal overhead
table_3_guard_band.note: Energy model uses simplified RX=12 mA / TX=28 mA at 3.3 V. Actual IoT device consumption varies by radio state machine.

uncertainty_calibration.note: Synthetic Gaussian model; 5000 MC samples, seed=42. Real calibration validation requires hybrid_f5.pth from training machine.

validation_type_key.trace-driven: Evaluated against recorded TLE/ephemeris data — no hardware
validation_type_key.simulation: Physics/communication simulation in Python — no hardware
validation_type_key.proxy_simulation: Physical proxy metric (QPSK EVM) demonstrating RF chain quality — no hardware
validation_type_key.lrfhss_inspired_proxy: LR-FHSS grid proxy — NOT a standards-compliant PER
validation_type_key.planned: Hardware acquisition and measurement are planned but not yet executed
